title: Trofie Pasta with Italian Vinaigrette
description: A simple and light Italian-inspired pasta dish with a refreshing vinaigrette made with velvety Italian dressing.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the trofie pasta according to package instructions until al dente.
In a large bowl, whisk together the Italian dressing and olive oil.
Add the cooked pasta to the bowl and toss with the dressing until well coated.
Top the pasta with shredded lettuce and grated Parmesan cheese.
Season with salt and pepper to taste, and serve immediately.
